title: No Armor gui
description: Removes the armor bar from the in-game HUD for a cleaner Minecraft interface.
body:
# Clean Armor HUD

A lightweight resource pack that removes the armor bar from Minecraft’s in-game HUD.  
Designed for players who want a cleaner interface and more screen space without altering gameplay.



![Armor HUD Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k2cEwjy6/images/8d8ab0bf35f5a20ec12a5f93143d6423cc7a5dca_350.webp)


## Overview

Clean Armor HUD removes only the armor GUI element while keeping the rest of the HUD fully intact.  
It is ideal for immersive gameplay, cinematic recordings, and minimal UI setups.


## Why Use This Resource Pack?

- Minimal interface for better immersion
- Increased visibility for screenshots and videos
- Clean and modern HUD appearance
- Simple and non-intrusive


## Features

- Hides the armor bar HUD element
- Leaves all other HUD elements unchanged
- Compatible with vanilla Minecraft
- Works with most modded clients
- Can be safely combined with other resource packs


## Installation

1. Download the resource pack from Modrinth
2. Place the `.zip` file into your `resourcepacks` folder
3. Enable it in Minecraft’s Resource Pack menu


## Compatibility

- Tested on current Minecraft versions
- Expected to work on most mod loaders and clients

## Performance Impact

None.  
This resource pack only modifies GUI textures and does not affect gameplay or performance.
